revisionChanges.description: Resource/policy card backgrounds changed from bg-white to bg-off-white in light mode

visualVerification.observation: Resource cards in light mode now use off-white background matching page background (#FBF6E2), creating a seamless blend. Cards are defined by subtle charcoal/10 border rather than bright white fill.

revisionChanges.description: Filter pill buttons and Clear All buttons now have cursor-pointer

filterPillsPhp.actual: inline-flex items-center gap-1 border border-current rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider cursor-pointer

clearAllActiveFiltersPhp.actual: order-last text-body-small ml-auto uppercase font-medium tracking-wider cursor-pointer

dynamicFilterPillsJs.actual: inline-flex items-center gap-1 border border-current rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider cursor-pointer

visualVerification.observation: All interactive filter buttons now show pointer cursor on hover, improving UX clarity

revisionChanges.description: Load More button in light mode has explicit gradient hover background in Archive.css

archiveCss.actual: background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-neon-green) 0%, var(--color-blue) 70%); border-color: var(--color-charcoal); color: var(--color-charcoal) !important;

revisionChanges.observation: Light mode Load More button now has explicit gradient background on hover, ensuring visibility against off-white page background. No longer transparent/white on hover.

revisionSummary.userRequest: Three targeted fixes: (1) Change light-mode resource/policy card backgrounds to off-white. (2) Add cursor-pointer to filter pills and Clear All buttons. (3) Fix Load More button hover visibility in light mode.
revisionSummary.implementationApproach: Modified card templates to use bg-off-white instead of bg-white. Added cursor-pointer class to all interactive filter buttons (PHP template + JS dynamic creation). Added Archive.css override for light-mode Load More button hover with explicit gradient background.
revisionSummary.verificationResult: All three changes verified and working correctly. No regressions detected. Card backgrounds now blend seamlessly with page in light mode. All interactive buttons show pointer cursor. Load More button has visible gradient on hover in light mode.
additionalObservations: The off-white card background change improves visual cohesion by reducing contrast between cards and page background
Cursor-pointer addition improves UX by providing clear affordance for interactive elements
Load More gradient fallback ensures button is always visible on hover regardless of CSS animation support
Dark mode behavior completely preserved - all changes are light-mode specific or additive (cursor-pointer)
